_comment: Add to VS Code settings.json (File > Preferences > Settings > Open settings.json)
_instructions: For Continue extension on current versions: copy continue_config.yaml to ~/.continue/config.yaml
For older Continue installs: copy continue_config.json to ~/.continue/config.json
For generic OpenAI extension: paste the settings below into settings.json
Replace YOUR-TUNNEL-URL with the actual URL from start_server.ps1 output
